system.description:
At 1st level, the power of your ashblood awakens. You bear the legacy of a Mythic Flame, an ancient spark passed down through blood, prophecy, or accident. Choose one Ashblood Legacy from the list below. This choice reflects the type of flame that burns within you—and grants you a unique feature. Your choice also influences your appearance: your breath may smoke in the cold, your scars may glow faintly, or ash may rise from your footsteps.

Legacy of the Pyreborn

You can stabilize a dying creature within 5 feet as a bonus action, and when you do, they also regain 1 hit point if they were reduced to 0 HP by fire or radiant damage.

When you cast a spell that deals fire damage, you can choose to deal radiant damage instead.

Legacy of the Phoenixheart

When you cast a spell of 1st level or higher that deals fire damage, you can spend 1 sorcery point to gain temporary hit points equal to your Charisma modifier + the spell’s level.

Once per long rest, when you drop to 0 HP, you can instead remain at 1 HP and immediately emit a 5-foot burst explosion. Any creature in range must make a Dexterity Saving Throw (Spell save DC) or take fire damage equal to your sorcerer level, and half on a success.

Legacy of the Ash Genie

You add the affliction spell school to the list of sorcerer spells available to you.

Once per round when you deal fire damage to a creature, you can mark it with your Ashrand. The next ally to hit that creature before the start of your next turn deals extra fire damage equal to your Charisma modifier.
